message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'init_poll_funcptr' sets signal field 'poll_table_struct._qproc', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=poll_table_struct;field=_qproc;offset=0] [oracle:assert=poll_table_struct._qproc stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets _qproc without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
